transcript.clean_text: wild fanat was in the yellow jersey after the great danish dipper he was also bossing the points classification too the green jersey worn by fabio jakobson no difference in the mountain jersey utter domination from magnus court antares the best of the young riders a general classification seven seconds between venard and the first leader lombard bogatya the best of the rest and of course the best of the gc riders it was a transfer evening on sunday evening before a full french rest day on monday ahead of the resumption of hostilities between dunkirk and calais in more sobering terms there was a minutes applause in memory of those who tragically lost their lives in a mass shooting in copenhagen denmark on sunday evening the first stage back on french roads would take 171.5 kilometers across six classified climbs with one intermediate sprint around the halfway point in lamp 1700 meters of climbing a possibility of crosswinds tricky terrain all day long with the probability of a bunch sprint magnus corp would be again on the attack from the first pedal strokes but he'd take a friend with him on stage four antoni perez also up the road there was apathy in the peloton for the first little while almost seven minutes of a gap before quick step alpha vinyl woke up almond casserole a couple of early splits but still with 130 kilometers to go things would eventually calm down once more at the intermediate sprint it was about as calm as it could be no contest in the front with court taking the mountains points perez was left to take the sprints points and it would only be in the last 500 meters or so that they'd wake up behind the men with the faster legs jakobson pulling back two points on fenard as the mountains points continued to be accumulated by magnus call the dane guaranteeing the jersey until the weekend perez then going off to take whatever he could towards the end court setting up with 44k to go and antony perez left the fight and make sure he picked up the most combative riders prize he'd be caught just off the final climb and then this happened yambo visma shades of pachinis on the opening stage a big team attack tispanot setting it up what for not taking it over the top only adam yates and jonas vince gore anywhere near them 10 kilometers remained here towards the finish and fernat decided to press on in groups ones twos threes fours plenty of them fragmented behind and no organization to chase down the yellow jersey still ahead by almost 30 seconds with just less than four kilometers to go there would be some organization very late in the day but not enough to catch fanart who had 16 seconds with a thousand meters still to ride second on each of the opening three stages fanart would bring the whalt factor he would be flying a win in the yellow jersey his seventh tour stage down the years one of the most special as jasper phillips a little cause for embarrassment behind winning the sprint thinking you've won the stage but that honor had already gone to the leader of the race while winning in yellow and extending his lead in the general classification cue celebrations teamwork setting it up christophe lapot there also finishing on the podium himself in third place winning stage four in cali fanart phillips laporte christophe on his 35th birthday just ahead of sagan mozarto from popple offsteader matthews and thomas walton art extending his lead in the general classification pulling on the yellow jersey yet again and turning those three second places into a first a check on his lead makes it 25 seconds ahead of lampard now pogacad at 32 still the best of the general classification guys with pitterson and thunderpool occupying those fourth and fifth spots fifth at 38 seconds but that could all change again on stage five it's the anticipated cobbled stage the cobbles of hubei with its 11 sectors finishing at aarhemberg and port du eno shorter and distance at 157 kilometers no classified climbs but 11 tough sectors of cobbles a big day and a day where gc contenders will be having nightmares about losing the tour as they all know they can't win it everybody has to be on high alert stage five will be a big one don't miss it it'll be live on discovery plus
